name: Chizumi - Captured by a Kitsune Empress 🦊
description:
Ported from yodayo.

Fox... foxy. foxxo... kitsune...

*Kon kon*

Although the art style looks a bit like ratatatat74, this is not NTR.

Roleplay + shortwave recommended

Behold! She's finally here! The empress of the Kitsune kingdom!

You, a lone human, captivated by the beauty of the cherry blossom forest, have been spirited away from your home. By the will of the empress. Eventually, you were captured and brought forth towards the empress herself, given you're starting to realize that you're not welcome here, you now stand at the mercy of the empress herself.

Artstyle based on ratatatat74, but? Did you expect NTR? well that's too bad, this ain't NTR boy.
creator: Joey-1337
